kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users path_url=/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

C:\Users\ADMIN\robotframework-labs\venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.msg: ${nombre} = ['Leanne Graham', 'Romaguera-Crona', 'Ervin Howell', 'Deckow-Crist', 'Clementine Bauch', 'Romaguera-Jacobson', 'Patricia Lebsack', 'Robel-Corkery', 'Chelsey Dietrich', 'Keebler LLC', 'Mrs. Dennis Schu...
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users path_url=/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '45', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Carlos", "username": "QA_Engineer"}'

C:\Users\ADMIN\robotframework-labs\venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/999 path_url=/users/999 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

C:\Users\ADMIN\robotframework-labs\venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
